description_long: This is a large, streamlined steam locomotive painted primarily in matte black with red wheels and detailing. The locomotive features a long, aerodynamic body with a sloped front and a prominent cab at the rear. On the side, a Soviet hammer and sickle emblem with 'CCCP' is visible, indicating its historical and regional context. The train has six large red driving wheels and two smaller wheels at the front, all connected by visible rods and mechanical linkages. The windows are small and rectangular, located only on the cab section, and there are no visible doors along the sides. The front of the locomotive is equipped with a red cowcatcher and a central headlamp, while the rear has a platform with railings.
description: A matte black, streamlined Soviet-era steam locomotive with red wheels, a sloped front, and a hammer and sickle emblem. Features include a long body, small cab windows, and a red cowcatcher.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the locomotive, red wheels, and the Soviet emblem with 'CCCP' on the side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the sloped nose, red cowcatcher, and central headlamp.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0 but without the emblem visible; shows the wheels and mechanical linkages.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the cab's back, platform with railings, and the end of the locomotive.
attribute_window_arrangement: small rectangular windows at cab only
